contract: research sources, competitor notes, keyword/entity findings, source dates, evidence gaps

artifact.name: RESEARCH

researchSources.used: owner, opening date, concept history, signature dishes
second-location context, added sides (mashed potatoes, mac & cheese), site history (former Gutamex Elenita / Brick City Grill)

competitorNotes.name: Vivian's Soul Food
competitorNotes.note: Established Cedar Rapids soul-food incumbent; reputation for 'best fried chicken in Iowa'; catfish + sweet potatoes + cornbread. Strongest brand to differentiate from.

competitorNotes.name: Sugapeach Chicken & Fish Fry
competitorNotes.note: Closest concept competitor (chicken + fish fry). Direct head-to-head on keywords.

competitorNotes.name: Royceann's Soul Food
competitorNotes.note: Soul-food competitor; overlaps on catfish/chicken searches.

competitorNotes.name: Odie's / Stinky's / Teddy's Bar & Grill
competitorNotes.note: Bar-and-grill all-you-can-eat Friday fish fry; capture Friday fish-fry intent rather than everyday fried seafood.

competitorNotes.name: Captains differentiators
competitorNotes.note: Broadest seafood variety in class (perch, tilapia, catfish, cod, red snapper, calamari, crab cakes, jumbo shrimp), made fresh to order, large family/party deals, late hours (11pm Fri/Sat), two Cedar Rapids locations.

keywordEntityFindings.strategyNote: Head term 'fish and chicken cedar rapids' matches the brand name and category exactly — own it. GEO/AI angle: exhaustively structure the menu (schema.org Menu + facts.json) so AI answer engines can cite specific dishes and prices. Anchor on the 1st Ave NE location and 52402 for map-pack relevance.

sourceDates.note: All aggregator data retrieved 2026-07-05; opening-era editorial from 2024-2025.

evidenceGaps: No keyword search-volume tool was run; keyword set is judgment-based from category + geography and needs volume validation
Numeric Yelp/Google star rating and review count not captured — required before an aggregateRating schema block can be emitted (do NOT fabricate)
Menu prices are aggregator-sourced and unverified by the owner

checklist.note: NAP consistent across Yelp, Tripadvisor, Facebook, delivery apps
Head + long-tail local keyword set drafted

checklist.reason: Numeric rating + review count still needed for aggregateRating; deferred to owner/GBP pull
